name: Alpine Acres Ranch

about.pull_quote: Welcome to Alpine Acres Ranch, nestled in the heart of the High Desert.
about.body_1: A family tradition of farming the land since our great, great grandparents homesteaded in the High Desert of Central Oregon in the late 1800s- We are a small farm working to regenerate this little slice of paradise and provide high quality seed garlic to the community.
about.body_2: The Ranch is home to a beloved llama herd, organic garlic fields, and a community of customers who believe in knowing where their food comes from. Everything we grow and raise carries the same intention: real, clean, and cared for.

garlic.intro_1: High mountain soil, clean snowmelt water, and short intense growing seasons produce garlic with exceptional flavor depth. Offering a variety of hardneck seed quality garlic- Organic Music, Chesnok Red Seed, Russian Red , & Lorz Italian.
garlic.intro_2: Everything is hand-planted and harvested, properly cured, and packaged on the farm. No warehouses, no middlemen.

tagline: A family ranch — organically grown seed garlic & pack llamas.

llamas.name: Bear Mountain Scout
llamas.description: Our strong and feisty lead llama who can tackle any trail.

llamas.name: Chance
llamas.description: A gentle soul who is steady on the trail and perfect for kiddos to ride.
